body:
Hey Amara,

Following up on our last exchange — I wanted to share that [Threshold Ventures](threshold-ventures) has been seeing a lot of inbound lately in the grid-edge software space, and a few of the teams remind me of the profile you described as your sweet spot at [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital). One in particular, an early-stage company building autonomous demand-response infrastructure for commercial real estate, might be worth a quick look if you have bandwidth this month. I know you've been deep in AI infra diligence, so no pressure if the timing is off, but I think the technical founder would resonate with your background. Happy to make a warm intro if you want me to loop them in. Let me know!

Mina
